title: Ability to create and update items directly from gmail
excerpt: It would be very helpful if there was a way to create and update items directly from gmail to specific boards on monday.com… or the ability to read all your emails on monday.com and do the same.

posts.author: mbarbaccia (Matthew Barbaccia)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be very helpful if there was a way to create and update items directly from gmail to specific boards on monday.com… or the ability to read all your emails on monday.com and do the same.
